top_signals.title: Chinese APT deploys new malware to keep access to hacked networks
top_signals.summary: A Chinese espionage group tracked as UNC5221 has been accessing Microsoft 365 environments using the Brickstorm backdoor and previously undocumented malware named Plenet and AgentPSD. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Speech by Commissioner Šefčovič at the Brussels Economic Security Forum
top_signals.summary:
European Commission Speech Brussels, 05 Jun 2026 Ladies and gentlemen,
It is a pleasure to return to the Brussels Economic Security Forum, so let me thank the European Policy Centre for the invitation.
